bullets: Sixteen founders of Africa's six unicorn ventures as of 2024, drawn from over 1,000 YouTube videos and nine hours of podcast audio parsed into more than 30,000 text chunks.

A retrieval-augmented generation pipeline over unnamed large language models reconstructs entrepreneurial narratives, evaluated with precision, recall, F1, faithfulness and a new context completeness score.
Faithfulness scores reach 0.94 to 0.99, and narrative quality depends more on thematic diversity than data volume, with reliable outputs from 800 to 1,200 curated chunks.
validation_note: precision, recall, F1 and faithfulness on generated narratives

bullets: A balanced corpus of 450,000 Turkish reviews, 225,000 authentic ones from the Hepsiburada platform and 225,000 synthetic fakes generated by seven methods across five families.
Fakes were generated with Markov chains, GPT-2, and instruction-tuned Qwen2, LLaMA-3 and Mistral; six Turkish transformer detectors were tested across five seeds with McNemar tests.
ElecTRa reached in-distribution F1 of 0.994 while BERTurk-128k led out-of-distribution accuracy at 0.943, and detection improved as synthetic generation variety increased.
validation_note: F1 and accuracy on labeled fake versus authentic reviews

bullets: 1,000 verified Amazon reviews across three product categories, with an out-of-domain Yelp corpus, in a single-run pilot study of marketing content generation.
DeBERTa-v3 extracts aspect-sentiment pairs, BART-large-MNLI classifies intent, and Gemini 2.5 Flash writes ads, scored by an LLM-as-judge across six dimensions with no human ground truth.
The aspect-aware pipeline scored groundedness 7.33 out of 10 versus 1.33 for both baselines and hallucination avoidance 8.33 versus about 1, though not statistically tested.
validation_note: LLM-as-judge scores, no human ground truth

bullets: Large language model agents constructing equity portfolios on Hong Kong, United States and China A-share markets under live, time-consistent market conditions.
The paper does not name the models; NextFund logs the full decision path from observation to trade, coordinates multi-agent analysis, and exposes an interactive trading arena for comparison.
Presented as an evaluation platform that makes agent decisions inspectable for fairer benchmarking, with no quantitative performance result reported.
